iterations.theme: The Essence of Love, Relationships, and Marriage: Challenges, Preparation, and Spiritual Foundations
iterations.reason_for_cut: This iteration covers the entire podcast, as its duration falls within the specified range for a single thematic block, maintaining a cohesive discussion from introduction to conclusion.

chapters.topic: Podcast Intro & Theme Introduction: Building Love and Responsibility
Marko's Definition of Love: Sacrifice and Compromise
Phases of Love (Seasons of a Relationship) and the Importance of Friendship Before Romance
Common Relationship Problems: Lack of Understanding and Gender Differences in Perception
The Value of Solitude for Emotional Healing and Self-Discovery
Fear of Loneliness and Societal Pressure to Be in a Relationship
The Role of Faith and Shared Spiritual Values in Relationships
Importance of Thorough Pre-Marital Preparation and Open Communication
Listener Call 1 (Šibenik): Love as a Divine Gift, Struggle, and Faith
Listener Call 2 (Marija Bistrica): True, Sincere Love vs. Materialism in Marriage
Generational Differences in Understanding Love: Love as Service and Giving
Fear of Commitment and the Reality of Marriage: A Positive Perspective
Musical Interlude: The Hymn of Love (1 Corinthians 13)
Post-Music Reflection and Prayer for Love, Healing, and Spiritual Guidance
Closing Remarks and Final Encouragement to Fight for Love and Values
